codeReview.summary: The codegen change correctly special-cases wildcard let bindings whose initializer infers to Result, emitting a two-value discard assignment while preserving the existing single-value path. The regression test exercises the exact reported failure through the full compile/gofmt/build/vet/run harness.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 9d6d56a. The fix is narrowly scoped, matches the feature requirements, and I found no high-confidence actionable bugs.
